patch:
--- a/alu_wrapper.sv
+++ b/alu_wrapper.sv
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
 module alu_core (
-  input [15:0] operand_a,
+  input [31:0] operand_a,
   input [31:0] operand_b,
   input [3:0] opcode,
   output [31:0] result
@@ -10,7 +10,7 @@
 module alu_top (
   input [31:0] op_a,
   input [31:0] op_b,
   input [3:0] op_code,
   output [31:0] alu_result
 );
   alu_core alu_inst (
-    .operand_a(op_a[15:0]),
+    .operand_a(op_a),
     .operand_b(op_b),
     .opcode(op_code),
     .result(alu_result)
   );
 endmodule
